name: usage-halt
description: Polls Claude Code's 5-hour usage block via ccusage. At 99% of the block limit, writes a halt flag that a universal PreToolUse hook reads to deny every tool call until the block resets. Sends macOS notifications on halt and resume.

configPrompts.prompt: Halt threshold percent (0-100). Default 99 halts at 99% of the 5hr block.
